title: 8 Signs Your "Leadership" Is Actually Control
caption:
Not every man who calls himself a leader is actually leading.

Real leadership — the kind Christ modeled — costs you something. First to apologize. First to serve. First into the hard thing. The man who leads by going first into the cost is the one people actually follow.

Control dresses up as leadership. But control picks who bears the cost, disappears when nobody's watching, can't receive a no, and measures success by how much authority it holds.

"Whoever would be great among you must be your servant." — Matthew 20:26.

Save this. Send it to any man in leadership — including the one in the mirror.

#faith #leadership #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #servantleadership #scripture #christianleadership #discipleship
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
